name: Sonovia Ltd.
summary: Sonovia Ltd. manufactures ultrasonic coating for fabrics to make them anti-bacterial and odorless. Its technology nano coats textiles found in hotels, restaurants, hospital bedding, patient gowns, and clothes with an ultrasonic semi-permanent, clear, odorless, antibacterial, and antifungal shield. The company also manufactures masks for COVID-19 situation. The company was formerly known as Nano-Textile Ltd and changed its name to Sonovia Ltd. in 2017. The company was founded in 2013 and is based in Ramat Gan, Israel.
